title: Factory v2 smoke – engagement listing endpoint
narrative_md:
# Factory v2 smoke – engagement listing endpoint

## Description

Add GET /api/engagements that lists engagements for the calling buyer org. Pagination via limit/offset query params.

## Tech Notes

Use the existing engagements repository and tenant-filter pattern. Add response schema to docs/openapi.json. Cover with unit + integration tests.

## Acceptance Criteria

- 200 with paginated list when authenticated as a buyer org user
- 401 when unauthenticated
- Empty list when no engagements exist for the org
- docs/openapi.json includes the endpoint with query params and response schema

## Out of Scope

Filtering, sorting, search

stories.description: Add GET /api/engagements endpoint that returns 200 with paginated list for authenticated buyer org users
acceptance_criteria: Returns 200 with paginated engagement list when authenticated as a buyer org user
Supports limit and offset query params for pagination
Filters engagements to calling buyer org only using tenant-filter pattern
Returns empty list when no engagements exist for the org

stories.description: Add authentication check to reject unauthenticated requests

acceptance_criteria: docs/openapi.json includes GET /api/engagements endpoint definition with query params (limit, offset) and response schema
Unit tests cover endpoint logic and tenant filtering
Integration tests cover 200, 401, and empty list scenarios
